title: Jakarta Servlet Request/Response Flow
description: A visual representation of the flow of an HTTP request through the servlet container and the components of the jakarta.servlet package that handle it.
relationships: Container receives request and creates ServletRequest & ServletResponse objects
Request passes through Filter chain for pre-processing
Servlet's service() method (e.g., doGet(), doPost()) processes request
Servlet interacts with backend services (DB, API)
Response passes back through Filter chain for post-processing
Container sends HTTP Response back to Browser
